commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in KaTeX rendering for Control UI chat through `ui.mathRendering`, extends markdown sanitization, wires the setting through Gateway/UI bootstrap, adds tests, and adds a `katex` UI dependency.

PR surface: Source +611, Tests +522, Config +1, Other +19. Total +1153 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR, not a current-main bug report. The missing evidence is after-fix Control UI proof rather than a reproduction of broken existing behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor-owned real behavior proof plus maintainer/security review; automation cannot provide the external PR proof gate for this branch.

target.title: feat(ui): add KaTeX math rendering support
target.body:
## Summary

Add KaTeX-based mathematical formula rendering to OpenClaw chat interface. When `ui.mathRendering` is set to `"katex"`, LaTeX math expressions (both inline `$...$` and display `$$...$$`) are rendered as beautifully formatted math in chat messages.

## Changes

### Configuration
- Add `mathRendering?: "off" | "katex"` to `types.openclaw.ts` UI config
- Add corresponding Zod schema in `zod-schema.ts` (inside `.strict()` ui object)

### Core Rendering
- New `ui/src/ui/katex-renderer.ts` module with math extraction, pre-processing, and synchronous rendering
- Placeholder-based architecture: extract math → sanitize HTML → restore rendered math
- Handles `\$` escaped delimiters, nested braces, display/inline modes
- Post-processes `katex-error` class → falls back to raw LaTeX text

### DOMPurify Integration
- New `toSanitizedMarkdownHtmlWithKatex()` function (original `toSanitizedMarkdownHtml` unchanged)
- `uponSanitizeAttribute` DOMPurify hook using `node.closest(".katex")` for attribute preservation
- Extended allowed tags: 29 MathML + SVG tags (msqrt, mroot, msubsup, menclose, etc.)
- Extended allowed attributes: 22 MathML + SVG attributes (mathvariant, displaystyle, etc.)

### Rendering Pipeline
- `grouped-render.ts`: Thread `mathRendering` through `renderMarkdownContent` selector
- Streaming: KaTeX disabled during streaming (`renderStreamingGroup` does not pass `mathRendering`)
- `chat.ts`: Preload KaTeX module + CSS when `mathRendering === "katex"`

### Tests
- 35 new test cases in `katex-renderer.test.ts` covering extraction, rendering, escaping, error handling
- All 154 tests pass (35 katex + 73 markdown + 46 grouped-render)

## Design Decisions

- **Full synchronous architecture**: No async changes to `toSanitizedMarkdownHtml`; new sync `toSanitizedMarkdownHtmlWithKatex` function
- **Streaming safety**: KaTeX rendering only applies to final (non-streaming) messages
- **Error resilience**: KaTeX parse errors gracefully fall back to displaying raw LaTeX
- **Zero breakage**: All existing callers of `toSanitizedMarkdownHtml` continue working unchanged

## Test Plan

- [x] 35 unit tests pass for katex-renderer module
- [x] 73 existing markdown tests pass (no regressions)
- [x] 46 grouped-render tests pass (updated for new mathRendering option)
- [x] Build succeeds
- [ ] Manual: Verify inline math `$E=mc^2$` renders correctly
- [ ] Manual: Verify display math `$$\sum_{i=1}^n x_i$$` renders correctly
- [ ] Manual: Verify streaming messages render without KaTeX, then render on completion
- [ ] Manual: Verify `ui.mathRendering: "off"` produces plain text (default behavior)
